name: PortfolioProp — Operating Model
description: Rental property portfolio management platform covering short-stay and long-term rental operations, owner client management, and compliance.

cap_l1_portfolio_mgmt.name: Portfolio Management
cap_l1_portfolio_mgmt.description: Ability to manage the aggregate collection of properties under ownership on behalf of clients.

cap_l2_portfolio_strategy.name: Portfolio Strategy
cap_l2_portfolio_strategy.description: Ability to define and maintain the strategic direction for a client portfolio.

cap_l3_portfolio_strategy_define.name: Define Portfolio Strategy
cap_l3_portfolio_strategy_define.description: Ability to define investment objectives, target mix and growth plan for a client portfolio.

cap_l3_portfolio_mix_manage.name: Manage Portfolio Mix
cap_l3_portfolio_mix_manage.description: Ability to manage the balance of short-stay and long-term properties across a client portfolio.

cap_l3_portfolio_lifecycle_manage.name: Manage Portfolio Lifecycle
cap_l3_portfolio_lifecycle_manage.description: Ability to manage the onboarding, transition and exit of properties within a client portfolio.

cap_l2_portfolio_performance.name: Portfolio Performance
cap_l2_portfolio_performance.description: Ability to measure and report on the financial and operational performance of a client portfolio.

cap_l3_yield_track.name: Track Yield Performance
cap_l3_yield_track.description: Ability to calculate and track rental yield and occupancy rate across properties in a portfolio.

cap_l3_benchmark_performance.name: Benchmark Portfolio Performance
cap_l3_benchmark_performance.description: Ability to benchmark portfolio performance against market comparables and targets.

cap_l3_performance_report.name: Report Portfolio Performance
cap_l3_performance_report.description: Ability to produce consolidated portfolio performance reports for owner clients.

cap_l1_property_mgmt.name: Property Management
cap_l1_property_mgmt.description: Ability to manage individual properties across their operational lifecycle.

cap_l2_property_onboarding.name: Property Onboarding
cap_l2_property_onboarding.description: Ability to onboard new properties into the management portfolio.

cap_l3_property_intake.name: Manage Property Intake
cap_l3_property_intake.description: Ability to assess, document and onboard a new property into the management system.

cap_l3_property_setup.name: Manage Property Setup
cap_l3_property_setup.description: Ability to configure property profiles, access arrangements and listing readiness.

cap_l3_property_compliance_setup.name: Manage Compliance Setup
cap_l3_property_compliance_setup.description: Ability to identify and configure compliance obligations for a newly onboarded property.

cap_l2_rental_strategy.name: Rental Strategy
cap_l2_rental_strategy.description: Ability to define and maintain the rental mode and pricing strategy for each property.

cap_l3_mode_manage.name: Manage Rental Mode
cap_l3_mode_manage.description: Ability to determine and switch a property between short-stay and long-term rental modes.

cap_l3_pricing_manage.name: Manage Pricing Strategy
cap_l3_pricing_manage.description: Ability to set and dynamically adjust nightly or periodic pricing based on demand signals.

cap_l3_availability_manage.name: Manage Availability
cap_l3_availability_manage.description: Ability to manage property availability calendars across all channels.

cap_l2_tenancy_mgmt.name: Tenancy Management
cap_l2_tenancy_mgmt.description: Ability to manage long-term tenancy agreements and tenant relationships.

cap_l3_tenancy_onboard.name: Manage Tenant Onboarding
cap_l3_tenancy_onboard.description: Ability to screen, approve and onboard tenants into a long-term tenancy agreement.

cap_l3_tenancy_lifecycle.name: Manage Tenancy Lifecycle
cap_l3_tenancy_lifecycle.description: Ability to manage the active tenancy including rent collection, renewals and notices.

cap_l3_tenancy_exit.name: Manage Tenancy Exit
cap_l3_tenancy_exit.description: Ability to manage the end of a tenancy including final inspection, bond return and handback.

cap_l1_booking_occupancy.name: Booking & Occupancy
cap_l1_booking_occupancy.description: Ability to manage the full booking lifecycle and guest experience for short-stay properties.

cap_l2_booking_mgmt.name: Booking Management
cap_l2_booking_mgmt.description: Ability to manage the intake, confirmation and amendment of guest bookings.

cap_l3_booking_intake.name: Manage Booking Intake
cap_l3_booking_intake.description: Ability to receive, assess and confirm guest booking requests across channels.

cap_l3_booking_calendar.name: Manage Availability Calendar
cap_l3_booking_calendar.description: Ability to maintain accurate availability calendars across all distribution channels.

cap_l3_booking_amendments.name: Manage Booking Amendments
cap_l3_booking_amendments.description: Ability to process booking modifications, cancellations and rebooking requests.

cap_l2_guest_intake.name: Guest Intake & Pre-Arrival
cap_l2_guest_intake.description: Ability to verify guest identity and prepare guests for arrival.

cap_l3_guest_verify.name: Manage Guest Verification
cap_l3_guest_verify.description: Ability to verify guest identity and screen for platform compliance prior to arrival.

cap_l3_pre_arrival_comms.name: Manage Pre-Arrival Communication
cap_l3_pre_arrival_comms.description: Ability to communicate arrival instructions, access details and local information to guests.

cap_l3_arrival_scheduling.name: Manage Arrival Scheduling
cap_l3_arrival_scheduling.description: Ability to coordinate guest arrival timing and access arrangements.

cap_l3_guest_guide.name: Manage Digital Guest Guide
cap_l3_guest_guide.description: Ability to produce and deliver a digital property guide to guests prior to arrival.

cap_l2_guest_relations.name: Guest & Tenant Relations
cap_l2_guest_relations.description: Ability to support guests during their stay and manage checkout and dispute resolution.

cap_l3_instay_support.name: Manage In-Stay Support
cap_l3_instay_support.description: Ability to respond to guest requests and issues during an active stay.

cap_l3_checkout.name: Manage Checkout Process
cap_l3_checkout.description: Ability to manage guest checkout including damage assessment and deposit release.

cap_l3_dispute.name: Manage Dispute Resolution
cap_l3_dispute.description: Ability to resolve guest disputes and platform claims on behalf of property owners.

cap_l1_maintenance_ops.name: Maintenance & Operations
cap_l1_maintenance_ops.description: Ability to manage property maintenance, cleaning and contractor operations.

cap_l2_maintenance_delivery.name: Maintenance Delivery
cap_l2_maintenance_delivery.description: Ability to manage maintenance requests from lodgement through to completion.

cap_l3_maint_request.name: Manage Maintenance Requests
cap_l3_maint_request.description: Ability to receive, triage and assign maintenance requests for managed properties.

cap_l3_maint_scheduling.name: Manage Maintenance Scheduling
cap_l3_maint_scheduling.description: Ability to schedule maintenance work to minimise impact on bookings and tenancies.

cap_l3_maint_quality.name: Manage Maintenance Quality
cap_l3_maint_quality.description: Ability to inspect and verify the quality of completed maintenance work.

cap_l2_cleaning_turnover.name: Cleaning & Turnover
cap_l2_cleaning_turnover.description: Ability to manage property cleaning, inspection and restocking between guest stays.

cap_l3_turnover_scheduling.name: Manage Turnover Scheduling
cap_l3_turnover_scheduling.description: Ability to schedule cleaning and turnover operations between bookings.

cap_l3_cleaning_standards.name: Manage Cleaning Standards
cap_l3_cleaning_standards.description: Ability to define and enforce property cleaning standards and inspection protocols.

cap_l3_linen_consumables.name: Manage Linen & Consumables
cap_l3_linen_consumables.description: Ability to manage linen inventory, replenishment and consumables restocking.

cap_l3_turnover_inspection.name: Manage Turnover Inspection
cap_l3_turnover_inspection.description: Ability to conduct and record property condition inspections following each turnover.

cap_l2_contractor_network.name: Contractor Network
cap_l2_contractor_network.description: Ability to build and manage a network of vetted contractors and service providers.

cap_l3_contractor_onboarding.name: Manage Contractor Onboarding
cap_l3_contractor_onboarding.description: Ability to vet, onboard and configure contractors into the operations network.

cap_l3_contractor_performance.name: Manage Contractor Performance
cap_l3_contractor_performance.description: Ability to track contractor performance, quality ratings and compliance status.

cap_l3_contractor_bulk.name: Manage Bulk Contracting
cap_l3_contractor_bulk.description: Ability to negotiate and manage bulk service agreements with high-volume contractors.

cap_l1_marketing.name: Marketing & Promotion
cap_l1_marketing.description: Ability to market properties, manage channel distribution and build reputation.

cap_l2_listing_mgmt.name: Listing Management
cap_l2_listing_mgmt.description: Ability to create, optimise and maintain property listings across platforms.

cap_l3_listing_create.name: Manage Listing Creation
cap_l3_listing_create.description: Ability to produce compelling property listings with photography, copy and amenity detail.

cap_l3_listing_optimise.name: Manage Listing Optimisation
cap_l3_listing_optimise.description: Ability to continuously optimise listing content and search ranking performance.

cap_l3_listing_compliance.name: Manage Listing Compliance
cap_l3_listing_compliance.description: Ability to ensure listings comply with platform terms, local regulations and advertising standards.

cap_l2_channel_mgmt.name: Channel Management
cap_l2_channel_mgmt.description: Ability to manage distribution across booking platforms and direct channels.

cap_l3_channel_setup.name: Manage Channel Setup
cap_l3_channel_setup.description: Ability to configure and connect property listings across OTA and direct booking channels.

cap_l3_channel_distribution.name: Manage Channel Distribution
cap_l3_channel_distribution.description: Ability to manage rate parity, availability and content consistency across channels.

cap_l3_channel_performance.name: Manage Channel Performance
cap_l3_channel_performance.description: Ability to track and optimise booking conversion and revenue per channel.

cap_l2_reviews_reputation.name: Guest Reviews & Reputation
cap_l2_reviews_reputation.description: Ability to manage guest reviews and maintain platform reputation scores.

cap_l3_review_generation.name: Manage Review Generation
cap_l3_review_generation.description: Ability to encourage and facilitate guest review submission following each stay.

cap_l3_review_responses.name: Manage Review Responses
cap_l3_review_responses.description: Ability to respond professionally to guest reviews on behalf of property owners.

cap_l3_reputation_monitoring.name: Manage Reputation Monitoring
cap_l3_reputation_monitoring.description: Ability to monitor platform reputation scores and flag emerging issues.

cap_l1_financial_mgmt.name: Financial Management
cap_l1_financial_mgmt.description: Ability to manage rental income, financial reporting and fee management for owners.

cap_l2_revenue_mgmt.name: Revenue Management
cap_l2_revenue_mgmt.description: Ability to manage rental income, reconciliation and cash flow visibility.

cap_l3_rental_income.name: Manage Rental Income
cap_l3_rental_income.description: Ability to reconcile and disburse rental income from OTA platforms and direct bookings.

cap_l3_maintenance_margin.name: Manage Maintenance Margin
cap_l3_maintenance_margin.description: Ability to track and manage the financial margin on maintenance and cleaning services.

cap_l3_cashflow_visibility.name: Manage Cash Flow Visibility
cap_l3_cashflow_visibility.description: Ability to provide owners with real-time visibility of cash flow and projected income.

cap_l2_financial_reporting.name: Financial Reporting
cap_l2_financial_reporting.description: Ability to produce accurate financial statements and owner reports.

cap_l3_owner_statements.name: Manage Owner Statements
cap_l3_owner_statements.description: Ability to produce monthly and annual income statements for owner clients.

cap_l3_tax_reporting.name: Manage Tax Reporting
cap_l3_tax_reporting.description: Ability to produce tax-compliant income reports for owner clients and their advisors.

cap_l3_financial_audit.name: Manage Financial Audit Trail
cap_l3_financial_audit.description: Ability to maintain an auditable trail of all financial transactions per property.

cap_l2_fee_billing.name: Fee & Billing Management
cap_l2_fee_billing.description: Ability to calculate, invoice and collect management fees from owner clients.

cap_l3_fee_calculation.name: Manage Fee Calculation
cap_l3_fee_calculation.description: Ability to calculate management fees, performance bonuses and ancillary charges.

cap_l3_billing_collections.name: Manage Billing & Collections
cap_l3_billing_collections.description: Ability to invoice owners and manage fee collection and reconciliation.

cap_l1_client_mgmt.name: Client Management
cap_l1_client_mgmt.description: Ability to acquire, onboard and retain owner clients.

cap_l2_client_acquisition.name: Client Acquisition
cap_l2_client_acquisition.description: Ability to identify, attract and convert prospective owner clients.

cap_l3_proposition_marketing.name: Manage Proposition Marketing
cap_l3_proposition_marketing.description: Ability to market the PortfolioProp management proposition to prospective owner clients.

cap_l3_prospect_qualification.name: Manage Prospect Qualification
cap_l3_prospect_qualification.description: Ability to qualify and assess prospective owner clients and their properties.

cap_l3_client_onboarding.name: Manage Client Onboarding
cap_l3_client_onboarding.description: Ability to onboard new owner clients including agreement execution and account setup.

cap_l2_client_relationship.name: Client Relationship
cap_l2_client_relationship.description: Ability to maintain and grow long-term relationships with owner clients.

cap_l3_relationship_mgmt.name: Manage Owner Relationship
cap_l3_relationship_mgmt.description: Ability to manage ongoing communication, satisfaction and retention of owner clients.

cap_l3_portfolio_review.name: Manage Portfolio Review
cap_l3_portfolio_review.description: Ability to conduct periodic portfolio reviews with owner clients to assess performance and strategy.

cap_l3_client_reporting.name: Manage Client Reporting
cap_l3_client_reporting.description: Ability to deliver regular performance reporting and insights to owner clients.

cap_l1_compliance_risk.name: Compliance & Risk
cap_l1_compliance_risk.description: Ability to manage regulatory compliance and operational risk across the portfolio.

cap_l2_regulatory_compliance.name: Regulatory Compliance
cap_l2_regulatory_compliance.description: Ability to identify, monitor and meet regulatory obligations across all managed properties.

cap_l3_compliance_identification.name: Manage Compliance Identification
cap_l3_compliance_identification.description: Ability to identify applicable regulatory, platform and legal obligations for each property.

cap_l3_compliance_monitoring.name: Manage Compliance Monitoring
cap_l3_compliance_monitoring.description: Ability to monitor compliance status and flag upcoming obligations and renewals.

cap_l3_compliance_reporting.name: Manage Compliance Reporting
cap_l3_compliance_reporting.description: Ability to produce compliance status reports for owner clients and regulators.

cap_l2_risk_mgmt.name: Risk Management
cap_l2_risk_mgmt.description: Ability to identify and manage operational and financial risks across the portfolio.

cap_l3_risk_identification.name: Manage Risk Identification
cap_l3_risk_identification.description: Ability to identify operational, financial and reputational risks across managed properties.

cap_l3_damage_assessment.name: Manage Damage Assessment
cap_l3_damage_assessment.description: Ability to assess and document property damage following guest stays or incidents.

cap_l3_insurance_mgmt.name: Manage Insurance Management
cap_l3_insurance_mgmt.description: Ability to manage insurance coverage requirements and claims for managed properties.

concept_guest.name: Guest
concept_guest.definition: A person who makes or holds a confirmed short-stay booking at a managed property.

concept_owner.name: Owner
concept_owner.definition: A property owner who has engaged PortfolioProp to manage one or more properties on their behalf.

concept_contractor.name: Contractor
concept_contractor.definition: A third-party service provider engaged to perform maintenance, cleaning or specialist trade work.

concept_tenant.name: Tenant
concept_tenant.definition: A person or household holding a long-term tenancy agreement for a managed property.

concept_property.name: Property
concept_property.definition: A physical dwelling managed by PortfolioProp on behalf of an owner, in either short-stay or long-term rental mode.

concept_portfolio.name: Portfolio
concept_portfolio.definition: The aggregate collection of properties managed on behalf of a single owner client.

concept_booking.name: Booking
concept_booking.definition: A confirmed reservation by a Guest to occupy a Property for a defined short-stay period.

concept_tenancy.name: Tenancy
concept_tenancy.definition: A formal long-term lease agreement between an Owner and a Tenant for the occupation of a Property.

concept_financial_report.name: Financial Report
concept_financial_report.definition: A structured financial summary produced for an owner covering income, expenses, fees and net return for a defined period.

concept_maintenance_request.name: Maintenance Request
concept_maintenance_request.definition: A recorded need for repair, servicing or remediation work at a managed property.

concept_guest_review.name: Guest Review
concept_guest_review.definition: A guest-submitted rating and commentary about their stay, published on a booking platform.

concept_compliance_obligation.name: Compliance Obligation
concept_compliance_obligation.definition: A regulatory, legal or platform requirement that must be met for a property or tenancy to operate lawfully.

concept_yield_performance.name: Yield Performance
concept_yield_performance.definition: A calculated measure of rental income return relative to property value and occupancy rate across a defined period.

concept_subscription_fee.name: Subscription/Fee
concept_subscription_fee.definition: The management fee agreement between PortfolioProp and an Owner, specifying fee structure, performance bonuses and billing cycle.

vs_short_stay_guest_experience.name: Short-Stay Guest Experience
vs_short_stay_guest_experience.description: End-to-end flow from guest booking request through to stay completion, income settlement and review publication.
vs_short_stay_guest_experience.trigger: Guest submits a booking enquiry or reservation request via OTA or direct channel
vs_short_stay_guest_experience.terminalOutcome: Guest completes their stay, income is settled, and a verified review is published

outcome_booking_enquiry_received.name: Guest submits booking request via channel

outcome_booking_confirmed.name: Booking confirmed, guest notified, availability calendar updated

outcome_guest_intake_complete.name: Guest identity verified, arrival instructions delivered, digital guide sent

outcome_property_prepared.name: Property cleaned, inspected, restocked and confirmed guest-ready

outcome_stay_commenced.name: Guest has arrived and property access confirmed

outcome_stay_completed.name: Guest has departed, property damage assessed, deposit released or claim raised

outcome_income_settled.name: Rental income reconciled, management fee calculated, owner statement updated

outcome_review_published.name: Guest review received and responded to, reputation score updated
